creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I am unable to build devel/wasi-libc on a week old 13-STABLE system. I get the following error:
mkdir -p "/usr/ports/devel/wasi-libc/work/wasi-libc-ad5133410f66b93a2381db5b542aad5e0964db96/sysroot/lib/wasm32-wasi" && \
mv *.o "/usr/ports/devel/wasi-libc/work/wasi-libc-ad5133410f66b93a2381db5b542aad5e0964db96/sysroot/lib/wasm32-wasi"
error: unable to create target: 'No available targets are compatible with triple "wasm32-unknown-wasi"'
1 error generated.
error: unable to create target: 'No available targets are compatible with triple "wasm32-unknown-wasi"'
1 error generated.
error: unable to create target: 'No available targets are compatible with triple "wasm32-unknown-wasi"'
1 error generated.
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:440: startup_files] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/devel/wasi-libc/work/wasi-libc-ad5133410f66b93a2381db5b542aad5e0964db96'
*** Error code 1
